channel.title: Legals on aiml.qa | AI/ML QA Services — Test, Validate & Red-Team Your AI
channel.description: Recent content in Legals on aiml.qa | AI/ML QA Services — Test, Validate & Red-Team Your AI

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
1. Introduction

aiml.qa (“we”, “our”, “us”) operates the website aiml.qa. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or engage our services.

2. Information We Collect

Information you provide directly:

  • Name and email address (via contact forms)
  • Company name and role
  • Message content submitted through our contact form
  • Information shared during discovery calls or engagements

Information collected automatically:

  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website
  • IP address (anonymized)

3. How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description:
1. Agreement

By accessing aiml.qa (“the Website”), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Website.

2. Services

aiml.qa provides AI/ML quality assurance consulting services. Specific service terms, deliverables, timelines, and fees are defined in individual Statements of Work (SOW) agreed upon with each client.

3. Intellectual Property

All content on this Website — including text, graphics, logos, and design — is the property of aiml.qa and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
